ideation: This animation sequence depicts a family, emphasizing the protective and nurturing aspects of family life.  The animation will show both arms extending outward and slightly downward, with the palms open. This represents welcoming, protection, and inclusivity. The movement will be slow and gentle, reflecting the steady nature of family bonds. Frame 1 will start with arms slightly raised. Frame 2 shows the arms moving down and out. Frame 3 shows the arms reaching their most extended position. Frame 4 shows the arms begin to move slightly inward. Frame 5 returns the arms to a slightly raised position, ready for a repeat.

frames.beat: arms gently lift, a welcoming embrace begins
arms extend outward and down, a protective gesture
arms reach their widest, embracing all
arms begin to draw inward, a comforting closeness
arms return to a gentle, ready position
